briefdescription.para: This is the file which contains TPM related code for the PLM.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 tri 03/13/25 Initial release pre 08/23/25 Did enhancements needed pre 09/23/25 Fixed misrac violations 1.2 pre 01/16/25 Updated comments for RTF documentation pre 03/12/26 Added validation of PCR number in partition measurement pre 03/16/26 Added PCR reading support in TPM pre 03/21/26 Implemented GetPcrLog feature to fetch PCR event log from TPM pre 04/22/26 Addition of access retry mechanism in case of TPM being busy
